items.title: NBA Draft Prospect Comparison Tool: nbadraftcomp.herokuapp.com
items.author: Hoop Informatics
items.body_excerpt:
NBA Draft Prospect Comparison Tool: nbadraftcomp.herokuapp.com

Search any prospect to see what players had similar stat profiles. You can even select that stat categories to use

Here is Keaton Wagler

images.alt: Table of similarity scores comparing draft prospects to Keaton Wagler, the 100% baseline with a draft age of 19.7. Ranked by similarity: Darius Acuff Jr. 93.21%, draft age 19.7; Kon Knueppel 91.36%, draft age 19.9; Labaron Philon 90.92%, draft age 20.6; Robert Wright III 90.64%, draft age 20.6; Tyler Tanner 90.19%, draft age 20.4; Kemba Walker 90.10%, draft age 21.1; Ebuka Okorie 90.09%, draft age 19.7; Trey Burke 90.01%, draft age 20.6; Kingston Flemings 89.73%, draft age 19.5; Nik Stauskas 89.61%, draft age 20.7; Wendell Moore Jr. 89.60%, draft age 20.8; Christian Anderson 89.56%, draft age 20.2; Will Riley 89.43%, draft age 19.4; Gary Harris 89.36%, draft age 19.8; Nick Johnson 89.31%, draft age 21.5; Miles McBride 89.20%, draft age 20.8.

items.title: My issue with Splitter as Blazers coach is I didn't think they played fast or aggressive enough on defense given their personnel. 21st in seconds per possession after a defensive rebound, 23rd after a turnover. It's a small gripe. I have an open mind about this hire mostly, like
items.author: Ricky O'Donnell
items.body_excerpt: My issue with Splitter as Blazers coach is I didn't think they played fast or aggressive enough on defense given their personnel. 21st in seconds per possession after a defensive rebound, 23rd after a turnover. It's a small gripe. I have an open mind about this hire mostly, like everything in BG era

items.title: June 15, 1994: Charles Oakley with the one-handed rebound and long outlet pass to John Starks for two points during Game 4 of the NBA Finals.
items.author: NBA Cobwebs
items.body_excerpt:
June 15, 1994: Charles Oakley with the one-handed rebound and long outlet pass to John Starks for two points during Game 4 of the NBA Finals.

Oakley had 16 PTS/20 REB and Starks scored 20 PTS in the Knicks' 91-82 win over the Rockets, which tied the series at 2-2.

items.title: Per Shams, the Bulls are finalizing the hire of Tiago Splitter.
items.author: Bobby Krivitsky
items.body_excerpt:
Per Shams, the Bulls are finalizing the hire of Tiago Splitter. 

That removes a finalist from the Trail Blazers’ search for a head coach, which Celtics assistant coach Tyler Lashbrook is in the running for.

📸: ESPN on X
